message:
Fix 3 async codegen blockers (allocator/modules/signatures)

Allocator scope (generator.zig, expressions.zig):
- Add module-level __global_allocator
- F-strings now use __global_allocator instead of undefined 'allocator'
- Initialize in main() before any async code runs

Module dependencies (compiler.zig):
- Patch @import("work_queue") → @import("work_queue.zig")
- Allows -I.build flag to resolve all runtime imports
- No need for complex --dep/--mod flags

Signature mismatches (calls.zig, work_queue.zig, test files):
- Don't inject allocator into async function calls
- Update 9 GreenThread.init() calls to 5-param signature (added cleanup)
- Tests compile successfully

New blocker found: spawn() requires 1-param functions, but async impl functions have 0 params
